posts.author: ashtondavanzo (ashton@adrenalinattractions.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Support alternative line items (Option A vs. Option B) within the same quote, with totals and taxes updating automatically based on the selected option.

What are you trying to achieve

Give clients clear pricing choices without creating multiple separate quotes.
